content.full_text:
Citizens Allied for a MultiPurpose Unified School
999-C Edgewater Blvd, #317
Foster City, CA 94404

AUG 6 1992

July 30, 1992

Sandra Taylor
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street
Sacramento, Ca. 95814

Dear Ms. Taylor:

Thank you for the time you spent on the telephone with me on
Tuesday. I appreciate your help with our questions. I am
writing to confirm our conversation and to request a written
confirmation from you as to the status of our committee,
Citizens Allied For A Multi-Purpose Unified School (CAMPUS).

As I explained over the telephone, our committee's goal is
to form a unified school district in Foster City. To
achieve this goal we have submitted petitions to the San
Mateo County Board of Elections. These petitions, if
verified, will bring our request to the San Mateo County
Committee on School District Organization and then to the
State Department of Education. The verification of the
signatures will not automatically qualify our request for
the ballot. That can only happen after approval of the
State Department of Education.

Based on the above information, you recommended that we file
a Statement of Termination for our committee since it does
not qualify as a recipient committee and should never have
been filed as such. I have filed this statement (Form 415)
with the Secretary of State as of this date. I would
appreciate a written confirmation to the above details from
you for our records. Again, thank you for your help.

Sincerely,

Eileen M. Child
Treasurer, CAMPUS

sections.question_synthetic: The sender is confirming a telephone conversation with FPPC staff regarding whether their committee (CAMPUS) qualifies as a recipient committee under FPPC regulations and requesting written confirmation of the advice received.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is an incoming request/correspondence letter from a committee member to FPPC staff, not an FPPC response letter. No formal question or conclusion sections present. The sender is requesting written confirmation of prior verbal advice received. Document contains handwritten elements and OCR artifacts but core content is legible.

embedding.summary: This is an incoming letter from Eileen M. Child, treasurer of CAMPUS (Citizens Allied for a Multi-Purpose Unified School), to Sandra Taylor at the FPPC dated July 30, 1992, confirming a prior telephone conversation and requesting written confirmation that the committee should file a Statement of Termination because it does not qualify as a recipient committee.
